## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User Impact

- What user workflow improves?
- What behavior is now different?

## Changes

- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Config/API updates (if applicable)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manually tested relevant flow

## Docs Checklist

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if setup changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/getting-started/*` if integration flow changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/configuration.md` if config changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/api-reference.md` if contracts changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/reference/*` if runtime behavior changed

## Risk

List any risks, edge cases, or follow-ups.
